'''wangadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placenticeratid|placenticeratid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placenticeratid|placenticeratid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wangadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wængædhæth|wængædhæth]] || [[word:wængædhæj|wængædhæj]] || [[word:wængædhæsh|wængædhæsh]] || [[word:wængædhæ|wængædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wangangadhath|wangangadhath]] || [[word:wangangadhaj|wangangadhaj]] || [[word:wangangadhash|wangangadhash]] || [[word:wangangadha|wangangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wangadhath|wangadhath]] || [[word:wangadhaj|wangadhaj]] || [[word:wangadhash|wangadhash]] || [[word:wangadha|wangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wangafdhath|wangafdhath]] || [[word:wangafdhaj|wangafdhaj]] || [[word:wangafdhash|wangafdhash]] || [[word:wangafdhaf|wangafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wangadhatha|wangadhatha]] || [[word:wangadhaja|wangadhaja]] || [[word:wangadhasha|wangadhasha]] || [[word:wangadhaka|wangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wangadhath|wangadhath]] || [[word:wangadhaj|wangadhaj]] || [[word:wangadhash|wangadhash]] || [[word:wangadha|wangadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wangadhathal|wangadhathal]] || [[word:wangadhajal|wangadhajal]] || [[word:wangadhashal|wangadhashal]] || [[word:wangadhakal|wangadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wangadhathatha|wangadhathatha]] || [[word:wangadhajaja|wangadhajaja]] || [[word:wangadhashasha|wangadhashasha]] || [[word:wangadhaka|wangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wangadhathan|wangadhathan]] || [[word:wangadhajan|wangadhajan]] || [[word:wangadhashan|wangadhashan]] || [[word:wangadhakan|wangadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wangadhathaoro|wangadhathaoro]] || [[word:wangadhajaoro|wangadhajaoro]] || [[word:wangadhashaoro|wangadhashaoro]] || [[word:wangadhakaoro|wangadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
